name: mushroom-grove
summary: An underground garden — fungal forest grown on cavern floor, bioluminescent caps, damp air, soft ground.

primary_palette.note: wild grove — scattered clusters of varying size
a single dominant giant cap with smaller growth beneath
bioluminescent variety — the grove is the light source
carnivorous grove — something feeds the mushrooms
cultivated grove — duergar or drow farm

story_prompts: wild underdark grove lit by its own glow, no one tends it
drow farm — tidy rows of cultivated mushrooms, a slave's basket nearby
myconid colony ground where the mushrooms watch
a grove poisoned by something upstream, caps blackening
recently burned grove regrowing — char and new shoots together

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: faint blue-green glow (0.15-0.3) from the caps themselves

anti_patterns: don't use straight walls — caverns should trim corners heavily or be irregular
don't light with torches unless someone brought them; the grove is self-lit
avoid furniture unless this is a cultivated variant
